{{Infobox concept
| name = Blackflame core
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

''See also: [[Blackflame core Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blackflame]] core is a secondary energy center used by [[Lindon]] to access the [[Path of Black Flame]], an art of pure destruction originally stolen from ancient [[dragons]]. Visually, it appears as a rotating sphere of black flames accented with red flashes that moves in synchronization with the user's breathing. Unlike a standard pure core, this core focuses on power through a [[Jade cycling technique]] rather than expansion. It provides access to highly potent, explosive, and destructive [[madra]] that can disintegrate physical matter into dust or ash without leaving molten residue. While the core offers significant combat advantages, such as the ability to fuel powerful techniques like [[dragon]]'s breath or the [[Burning Cloak]], it carries heavy risks. The use of [[Blackflame madra]] can erode a person's soul, sanity, lifespan, and physical body. To mitigate these effects, users must cleanse their channels after extensive use. [[Lindon]] manages the strain by switching between his pure core and his [[Blackflame]] core as needed, utilizing the [[Heaven and Earth Purification Wheel]] to help his body handle the intensity. The energy within the core is described as primal, savage, and ravenous, acting as a force that devours the material world.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] possesses a [[Blackflame]] core that rotates slowly and without direction, moving in rhythm with his breathing. During his journey, the core is eventually reduced to nothing more than a single smoldering red-and-black ember. When [[Lindon]] attempts to draw upon the power of his [[Blackflame]] core, he finds that it has become entirely empty.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Blackflame core]] rotates slowly without direction in rhythm with [[Lindon]]'s breath.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10">''Blackflame'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] possesses a [[Blackflame core]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c11">''Blackflame'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]]'s [[Blackflame core]] is reduced to a single smoldering red-and-black ember.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c14">''Blackflame'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]]'s [[Blackflame core]] is empty.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] tried to draw on his [[Blackflame core]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18" />}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] refilled his [[Blackflame core]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] is approaching the limit of his [[Blackflame core]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] pulls [[madra]] into his [[Blackflame core]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Lindon]]'s [[Blackflame core]] was virtually untouched.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c14">''Wintersteel'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
